name: Pork Chops Fdgn81a
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large iron skillet, brown pork chops on both sides until golden brown, about 4 minutes per side.
2. Sprinkle with salt and pepper.
3. Add water to the pan.
4. Spread ketchup on top of chops.
5. Add green onion, mushrooms, green pepper, Tabasco sauce, Worcestershire sauce, and sugar (if used).
6. Bring mixture to a boil.
7. Cover and reduce heat.
8. Simmer for 45 to 50 minutes until chops are fork tender.
9. Taste and adjust seasonings if necessary.
10. Serve immediately.
